reason: Successfully navigated to the application, found and clicked on agent QA-20260627-000417-4b15, verified status as "idle", sent a message "Hello! What is 2+2?", received a response within 1 second (well under the 3-minute timeout), and verified the response correctly stated "4".
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully, showing home page with two agents in the sidebar.
Step 2 - Found agent "QA-20260627-000417-4b15" in the sidebar and clicked it — Successfully clicked the agent link, navigated to the agent detail page.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" in the top right corner of the page, meeting the requirement.
Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Clicked the message input field, typed the message, and clicked the send button. Message was successfully submitted.
Step 5 - Waited for response — Agent responded within 1 second with the correct answer, well within the 3-minute timeout window.

Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent's response displays "4" as a standalone response. Screenshot saved as step6-response-screenshot.png showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", with "Worked for 1s" indicator. Session was automatically named "Simple Math Question Session".
